# site-packages-used.txt — generated by util/scripts/trace-site-packages.py
# One path per line, relative to the site-packages root.
# Consumed by util/scripts/strip-unused-pyfiles.sh to remove dead weight.
# Safe to append — re-running trace merges into this file.
#
# STATUS (2026-04-20): EMPTY — operator must populate.
#
# The initial trace could not be run from the scaffolding environment
# (muulam is Docker-only, not installed on the host). To populate this
# list, run the following AT LEAST ONCE from the gyanam/ root on a
# machine with a working Python environment OR from inside a running
# backend container:
#
#   python3 util/scripts/trace-site-packages.py -- \\
#       python3 -c "from muulam import create_app; create_app()"
#   python3 util/scripts/trace-site-packages.py -- \\
#       python3 -m muulam.cli seed
#   python3 util/scripts/trace-site-packages.py -- \\
#       pytest framework/lochan/tests/smoke -x --no-header
#
# Until this file has at least one non-comment line, the build-arg
# STRIP_UNUSED=true is a no-op (warning logged, build continues with
# full site-packages). Default STRIP_UNUSED=false, so the stripping
# stage is disabled unless explicitly engaged.
#
# See docker/SITE-PACKAGES-STRIPPING.md for the full operator playbook.
